candidates.why: Direct total current assets line on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Wrong section; non-current rather than current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Cash component, but narrower than full cash and cash equivalents because marketable securities are shown separately.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents period end
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending balance, but balance sheet is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Preferred the balance-sheet total cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.why: Direct total current liabilities line on the balance sheet.
Major component of current liabilities, but not total because current debt, provisions, and taxes are separate.
Balancing line, not the reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Direct current portion of long-term debt and explicitly excludes leases, which matches baseline STD definition.
Direct short-term borrowings/current debt component; complements current portion of long-term debt.

candidates.row_label: Current portion of long term loans
candidates.why: Includes leases based on nearby lease split, so less preferred than the excluding-leases line.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Chose two balance-sheet components to capture short-term debt without leases: current portion of long-term debt excluding capitalized leases, plus short-term loans. Did not use lease rows or the broader current-portion line to avoid lease inclusion/double counting.

candidates.why: Direct current taxes payable/current tax liability line.

variables.notes: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Reported total tangible fixed assets; best available proxy for total/net PPE.
Would be preferable if populated, but values are blank here.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Only lease-related tangible assets, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Used total tangible assets as the best available total/net PPE measure.

candidates.why: Direct total assets line on the balance sheet.
Not total assets; only a long-term asset placeholder.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities
candidates.why: Direct net operating cash flow line on the cash flow statement.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities

variables.notes: Direct match for operating cash flow.
